diagrams.title: Flip-Flop Circuit
diagrams.description: A simple memory element that can store a single bit of binary data
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the basic operation of a flip-flop

diagrams.title: Characteristic Table
diagrams.description: A table that describes the next state of a flip-flop based on its current state and inputs
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of a characteristic table

diagrams.title: Clock Signal
diagrams.description: A signal that controls the timing of a circuit's operation
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the importance of the clock signal in a flip-flop circuit
